title: Top 25 B2B Data Stack Voices of 2026
subtitle: The most influential voices shaping how B2B teams choose and implement their data tools
methodology: Ranked by cross-list appearances, community impact, published work, and relevance to B2B data tools and martech. Sources include industry publications, martech community tracking, conference speaker lists, and independent analysis.

voices.name: Scott Brinker
voices.title: VP Platform Ecosystem
voices.bio: Creator of the Marketing Technology Landscape (now 14,000+ tools), the most referenced visual in martech history. VP Platform Ecosystem at HubSpot. His chiefmartec.com blog and annual Martech Conference define how the industry thinks about tool selection and stack architecture.

voices.name: Kyle Poyar
voices.title: Author
voices.bio: Runs Growth Unhinged, one of the most popular newsletters on SaaS growth and pricing. Former partner at OpenView where he shaped PLG strategy for dozens of B2B tools. His analysis of SaaS pricing, packaging, and tool adoption data is required reading for anyone evaluating B2B data tools.

voices.name: David Cancel
voices.title: CEO & Founder
voices.bio: Built Drift into the conversational marketing category, acquired by Salesloft. Serial entrepreneur (5 startups, 3 acquired). His content on product-led growth, B2B buying behavior, and the death of forms shaped how an entire generation of B2B companies think about their go-to-market stack.

voices.name: Elena Verna
voices.title: Growth Advisor
voices.bio: The most influential voice on product-led growth strategy. Held growth leadership roles at Miro, Amplitude, and SurveyMonkey. Her frameworks on PLG, community-led growth, and growth loops define how B2B companies structure their tool stack around user behavior data.

voices.name: Sangram Vajre
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded Terminus (ABM platform) and GTM Partners. Author of 'MOVE' and 'ABM is B2B.' His work defining Account-Based Marketing as a category and then evolving it into GTM strategy shaped how B2B teams think about their data and targeting infrastructure.

voices.name: Jon Miller
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded Marketo (the marketing automation category) and Engagio (ABM). Now at Demandbase. Two of the most important B2B data tools of the last 15 years trace back to him. His content on data-driven marketing, ABM orchestration, and the evolution of B2B buying is foundational.

voices.name: Max Altschuler
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Founded Sales Hacker (acquired by Outreach), the largest community for B2B sales professionals. Now runs GTMfund, a VC fund investing in GTM tools. His perspective on the B2B sales tool stack, from enrichment to engagement to analytics, comes from both operating and investing.

voices.name: Tomas Tunguz
voices.title: Managing Director
voices.bio: One of the most data-driven VCs in B2B SaaS. His blog (tomtunguz.com) has analyzed SaaS metrics, go-to-market strategies, and tool adoption patterns for over a decade. Now runs Theory Ventures focused on AI-powered B2B tools. His benchmarking data shapes how the industry evaluates tool performance.

voices.name: Jacco van der Kooij
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Author of 'Revenue Architecture.' Created the Bowtie model for recurring revenue. 32K+ LinkedIn followers. His operating frameworks for SaaS revenue teams define how B2B companies structure their data flows across marketing, sales, and customer success tools.

voices.name: Kipp Bodnar
voices.title: CMO
voices.bio: CMO of HubSpot and co-host of Marketing Against the Grain podcast. His perspective on the HubSpot ecosystem, CRM-centric data architecture, and the evolution of the marketing stack shapes how hundreds of thousands of companies think about their B2B tool decisions.

voices.name: Justin Keller
voices.title: VP of Revenue Marketing
voices.bio: Runs revenue marketing at Drift/Salesloft. His content on the intersection of marketing data, sales engagement, and conversational AI helps teams understand how modern B2B data stacks should connect.

voices.name: Amanda Natividad
voices.title: VP of Marketing
voices.bio: VP Marketing at SparkToro and one of the sharpest voices on audience research data. Her content on how to use audience intelligence tools, zero-click marketing, and the limitations of traditional marketing data stacks challenges conventional thinking about B2B data.

voices.name: Rand Fishkin
voices.title: Co-Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Co-founded Moz (SEO tools) and SparkToro (audience research). His candid content on what's wrong with B2B marketing data, attribution, and the tool bloat problem resonates with anyone who's frustrated by their overbuilt, underperforming tech stack.

voices.name: Chris Walker
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: 100K+ LinkedIn followers. Former Refine Labs CEO. His demand generation frameworks and vocal criticism of attribution models shaped how B2B teams think about what their data tools can and can't measure. Now building Passetto for GTM analytics.

voices.name: Matt Heinz
voices.title: President
voices.bio: Runs Heinz Marketing and hosts Sales Pipeline Radio. His practical content on B2B marketing operations, pipeline development, and tool implementation helps mid-market teams make smart stack decisions without overbuilding.

voices.name: Tejas Manohar
voices.title: Co-Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Built Hightouch, the reverse ETL platform that turned the data warehouse into a marketing activation layer. His vision of composable CDP architecture changed how B2B teams think about their data infrastructure. The warehouse-native data stack starts with Hightouch.

voices.name: Peter Reinhardt
voices.title: CEO
voices.bio: Co-founded Segment, the customer data platform acquired by Twilio for $3.2B. Segment defined the CDP category and how B2B teams collect, unify, and route customer data. His writing on data infrastructure is still the reference architecture for most B2B data stacks.

voices.name: Latane Conant
voices.title: Former CMO
voices.bio: Former 6sense CMO and author of 'No Forms. No Spam. No Cold Calls.' Her advocacy for intent data, predictive analytics, and eliminating forms from B2B marketing shaped how an entire category of data tools (6sense, Bombora, G2) is positioned and used.

voices.name: Aaron Ross
voices.title: Author & Advisor
voices.bio: Author of 'Predictable Revenue,' the book that created the SDR/BDR model and drove adoption of outbound data enrichment tools. His framework for specializing sales roles created the demand for the entire B2B data enrichment category (ZoomInfo, Apollo, Lusha, etc.).

voices.name: Gaetano DiNardi
voices.title: Growth Advisor
voices.bio: Growth advisor and former VP Marketing who writes about B2B growth strategy with a focus on what tools actually drive results. His honest take on martech ROI and the gap between tool promises and reality helps buyers make informed decisions.

voices.name: Kaylee Edmondson
voices.title: Demand Gen Leader
voices.bio: One of the sharpest demand gen practitioners on LinkedIn. Her content on marketing operations, tool evaluation, and the practical reality of running B2B campaigns helps teams separate tool hype from operational necessity.

voices.name: Emily Kramer
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded MKT1, a marketing advisory firm and newsletter. Former VP Marketing at Asana and Carta. Her frameworks on marketing team structure, budgeting, and tool selection help B2B marketing leaders make data-driven stack decisions.

voices.name: Robert Rose
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Chief Strategy Advisor at Content Marketing Institute. Author of 'Killing Marketing.' His work on content operations and the data infrastructure that supports content-led growth helps B2B teams think beyond campaign tools to content as a strategic data asset.

voices.name: Mark Roberge
voices.title: Managing Director & Author
voices.bio: Former CRO of HubSpot. Author of 'The Sales Acceleration Formula.' Now teaches at HBS and runs Stage 2 Capital. His data-driven approach to sales team building and tool adoption created the playbook that thousands of B2B companies still follow for their first CRM and sales stack.

voices.name: Dharmesh Shah
voices.title: Co-Founder & CTO
voices.bio: Co-founded HubSpot, the CRM platform that 200,000+ companies run their data stack on. Author of 'Inbound Marketing.' His recent work on AI agents and the future of CRM shapes where the entire B2B data stack is heading. 1M+ LinkedIn followers.
